rows.label: qev085108_MSG0004
rows.name: I still don't quite know. But—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085108_MSG0005
rows.name:
Rock seems to be enjoying himself,
so I want to stay here for a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085108_MSG0006
rows.name:
I'm so glad! If you have any
trouble, please let us know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085108_MSG0007
rows.name: These people will solve anything for you mo![ST:wait ]
